name: Moneytree
description: Tokyo-based open banking aggregator — LINK API for financial data across 2500+ Japanese banks, cards and wallets.

seo.title: Moneytree — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Moneytree: Tokyo-based open banking aggregator — LINK API for financial data across 2500+ Japanese banks, cards and wallets.

when_to_use: Financial data aggregation across 2500+ Japanese institutions
Account balance and transaction data for Japanese fintech apps
Building personal finance tools for the Japanese consumer market
Open banking API connecting banks, cards, and wallets in Japan
Income and cashflow analytics for Japanese lending platforms

pros: Deepest Japan bank and card coverage available
LINK API tuned for Japanese regulatory landscape
review.verdict: Default pick for Japan financial data, but irrelevant for teams outside the Japanese market.
review.best_for: Fintechs and PFM apps operating inside Japan
review.not_for: Cross-APAC or global teams needing multi-country coverage

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is insufficient evidence
